title: Luffy Answers the Call
description: On pages 11–14, this part follows Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8. The central beat is luffy answers the call.
scene: The scene focuses on luffy answers the call, with Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But nobody could possibly live here now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I don't feel like eating right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No point helping them!! Let's go back!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This whole place really is Ablaze ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Oh, wait... We already did that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hey!!! Den-den mushi guy, are you here?!!!

summary: Luffy Answers the Call. This part moves the Straw Hats from Fish-Man Island into the New World and begins the mystery of Punk Hazard.
